reason: The video frames provided show a computer-based surgical simulation/VR training application displaying 3D anatomy (liver model) with a blue surgical instrument probe visible. However, this is NOT an actual FLS task being performed. The frames show:
observations: Desktop computer display showing 3D surgical simulation software (not an FLS trainer box)
Person's hand visible on right side, but no actual FLS instruments (graspers, needle drivers) are being manipulated
The display shows virtual/rendered anatomy, not the physical FLS trainer models (peg board, gauze, Penrose drain, appendage, etc.)
This appears to be a virtual reality or computer-based surgical simulator, not a physical MISTELS/FLS task
No actual task completion can be scored without physical FLS trainer apparatus
cannot_score: This is not an FLS MISTELS task video. The content is a computer-based surgical simulation interface, not a performance of an official FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) on FLS training equipment.
recommendation: Please provide a video showing actual FLS task performance on official FLS trainer equipment for scoring.
